sections.paragraph:
Ch., Dan 7:22, inf. מֵתֵא Dan 3:2, i.q. Heb. to come; with עַל of pers. Ezr 4:12 5:3 .

Aphel הַיְתִי inf. הַיְתָיָה (by a Hebraism)-

(1) to cause to come, Dan 6:17, 25 .

(2) to bring, to fetch, Dan 5:3, 23 . Syr. ܙܰܝܬܺܝ.

Hophal, borrowed from the Hebrew, but anomalous הֵיתִי, 3 fem. הֵיתַיִת, Dan 6:18 pl. הֵיתָיוּ Dan 3:13, to be caused to come, to be brought.
